General.Name: Northpointe Bancshares, Inc.
General.Description: Northpointe Bancshares, Inc. operates as the bank holding company for Northpointe Bank provides various banking products and services in the United States. It operates through two segments: Mortgage Purchase Program and Retail Banking. The company provides digital deposit banking, such as noninterest-bearing accounts, savings, money-market demand accounts, and certificates of deposits; personal and business banking; and health saving accounts; home loans; mortgage purchase program; residential mortgage lending; and custodial deposit services. Northpointe Bancshares, Inc. was incorporated in 1998 and is headquartered in Grand Rapids, Michigan.
General.Address: 3333 Deposit Drive Northeast, Grand Rapids, MI, United States, 49546-1467
